title: National income statistics
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — GDP, GNI, nominal vs real, and per capita measures.
learningObjectives: Explain three approaches to measuring GDP.
Distinguish nominal and real national income.
Evaluate limitations of national income data.

simpleExplanation.title: Measuring a country's output
simpleExplanation.summary: National income statistics estimate total economic activity. GDP counts production within borders; GNI includes net income from abroad.
steps: Output: value added at each stage.

sections.content: **National income** (4.1) underpins **macro analysis**. Know **all three measurement approaches** and **GDP vs GNI**.
